'''tharoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnation|mnation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnation|mnation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tharoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæreketh|thæreketh]] || [[word:thærekej|thærekej]] || [[word:thærekesh|thærekesh]] || [[word:thæreke|thæreke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tharorokoth|tharorokoth]] || [[word:tharorokoj|tharorokoj]] || [[word:tharorokosh|tharorokosh]] || [[word:tharoroko|tharoroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharokoth|tharokoth]] || [[word:tharokoj|tharokoj]] || [[word:tharokosh|tharokosh]] || [[word:tharoko|tharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharofkoth|tharofkoth]] || [[word:tharofkoj|tharofkoj]] || [[word:tharofkosh|tharofkosh]] || [[word:tharofkof|tharofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tharokotho|tharokotho]] || [[word:tharokojo|tharokojo]] || [[word:tharokosho|tharokosho]] || [[word:tharokoko|tharokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tharokoth|tharokoth]] || [[word:tharokoj|tharokoj]] || [[word:tharokosh|tharokosh]] || [[word:tharoko|tharoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tharokothol|tharokothol]] || [[word:tharokojol|tharokojol]] || [[word:tharokoshol|tharokoshol]] || [[word:tharokokol|tharokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tharokothotho|tharokothotho]] || [[word:tharokojojo|tharokojojo]] || [[word:tharokoshosho|tharokoshosho]] || [[word:tharokoko|tharokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tharokothon|tharokothon]] || [[word:tharokojon|tharokojon]] || [[word:tharokoshon|tharokoshon]] || [[word:tharokokon|tharokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tharokothoro|tharokothoro]] || [[word:tharokojoro|tharokojoro]] || [[word:tharokoshoro|tharokoshoro]] || [[word:tharokokoro|tharokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
